title: Salesforce's Mark Benioff Counters 'Software Bears' With Agentforce's Impressive Performance: 'Opportunity Has Never Been Greater'
author: Namrata Sen
description: Salesforce CEO Mark Benioff defended the software industry against skeptics, highlighting Agentforce's strong performance at Pearson and PenFed, where AI agents achieved 40% improvements in query resolution and IT ticket reduction respectively. Benioff emphasized that AI is enhancing Salesforce's value rather than threatening it, and announced Headless 360, an API-first model enabling AI agents to operate across workflows and business logic.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Benioff's confident rebuttal of industry skepticism, combined with concrete performance metrics from Agentforce deployments (40% improvements at major clients) and the launch of Headless 360, demonstrates strong AI integration capabilities and business value delivery, positioning the company favorably despite recent stock declines.
Pearson achieved a 40% increase in customer queries resolved without human intervention using Agentforce, demonstrating significant operational efficiency gains and successful AI implementation.

title: AI in Education Market Size to Surpass USD 136.79 Billion by 2035 Amid Rapid EdTech Expansion and AI Adoption
author: Precedence Research
description: The global AI in education market is projected to grow from USD 7.05 billion in 2025 to USD 136.79 billion by 2035, expanding at a CAGR of 34.52%. North America leads the market with 38% share, while Asia Pacific shows the fastest growth. Machine learning and cloud-based solutions dominate, with personalized learning and administrative automation driving adoption across K-12, higher education, and corporate training sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: IBM is highlighted as a key player in the AI education market with Watson Education tools that help instructors personalize learning and automate administrative tasks, positioning it well in a rapidly growing market.

Google is mentioned as a major market player with AI integration in Google Classroom and a $1 billion investment commitment in AI education across the United States, demonstrating strong market presence and growth commitment.

Google is mentioned as a major market player with AI integration in Google Classroom and a $1 billion investment commitment in AI education across the United States, demonstrating strong market presence and growth commitment.
Microsoft is identified as a key player integrating AI into its ecosystem through Learning Accelerators and progress tracking tools, benefiting from the expanding AI in education market.
AWS is recognized as offering cloud-based AI tools like Alexa and Lex for EdTech developers, capitalizing on the 57% market share held by cloud-based solutions in the AI education sector.
Pearson is noted for incorporating AI into digital platforms like MyLab with adaptive assessments and data-driven tutoring, positioning it favorably in the growing higher education AI market segment.
McGraw Hill is highlighted through its subsidiaries ALEKS and Kidaptive, offering AI-powered adaptive learning platforms that address the market's demand for personalized learning experiences.

title: Latin America E-Learning Market Research Report 2025-2035: Increasing Adoption of VR and AR in Digital Classrooms, Growth in Gamification & Interactive Content, Rise of EdTech Startups
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: Latin America's e-learning market is projected to grow at 9.33% CAGR from 2024 to 2030, reaching $52.1 billion by 2030. The market is driven by digital platforms, increasing internet access, and a focus on skills development, with Brazil leading regional adoption.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Launching innovation hub, strong in global learning platforms, driving innovation through research
Adapting traditional academic base to digital transformation, investing in generative AI
Providing cybersecurity and infrastructure support, using AI for cyber protection

title: Game-based Learning Company Evaluation Report 2025 | Duolingo, Kahoot!, and Skillsoft Lead with AI Personalization, Interactive Platforms, and Corporate Training Innovation
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: A comprehensive market analysis reveals top game-based learning companies like Duolingo, Kahoot!, and Skillsoft are leading innovation through AI personalization, interactive platforms, and corporate training solutions across educational sectors.

title: NCSBN Award Ceremony Honors Outstanding Nurse Regulators
author: Globe Newswire
description: The National Council of State Boards of Nursing (NCSBN) will honor outstanding professionals and organizations at its annual awards ceremony during the Annual Meeting and Delegate Assembly in Chicago, recognizing contributions to nursing regulation and public welfare.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Tony Zara from Pearson VUE receiving the prestigious Founders Award indicates recognition of the company's ethical contributions
